notes: HAR-708 captures a public-URL Files API MediaImage create followed by an immediate reverse-ordered top-level files read so the newly-created file is the first node even on a non-empty disposable shop. Shopify 2026-04 returned a fresh fileStatus of UPLOADED in the create payload, then PROCESSING on the immediate files read in this capture. The proxy keeps the original URL available through local MediaImage.image/preview immediately because it has no external asynchronous processing queue to wait on. Shopify's immediate image materialization and status transition remain timing-dependent, so image/preview payload object differences and the immediate read status are documented as local processing divergence while ID/timestamp/alt/read-after-write shape remain strict.

expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy generates a local MediaImage GID; Shopify returns the dev-store MediaImage GID.
The proxy uses its deterministic staged timestamp sequence; Shopify returns the live creation timestamp.
The proxy generates a local MediaImage GID; Shopify returns the dev-store MediaImage GID.
The proxy uses its deterministic staged timestamp sequence; Shopify returns the live creation timestamp.
